verify.title: Qun tob
verify.how:
QunmeyvetlhDI' choHlu', ngoq SoQ chel jInmolvam, ngoqmey wa' rarlu'. ngoq tIQ choHlu'chugh, Hoch rar Qaw'lu'. jInmol naQ Hoth De'wI'lIj, naDev qel; HoSwI' Hubmey lulajbe'.

about.title: De'
about.intro: Nostragoalus: QI'D noH Quj poSmoHlu'pu'bogh. mI'mey yInoH, QuQmey yISuq, juppu'lI' tIjey.
about.aiText: naQ Doch - ngoq, nagh, mughmey je - Claude (Anthropic) tlhej chenmoHlu'. AI ngoq qonta'; Humanpu' wuqmey ghaj.
about.stackSub: poSmoHlu'pu'bogh jan Dochvam Qutlh. Hoch nav projectDaq ghoS; Degh licenseDaq ghoS.
about.dataText: may' De' FIFA UEFA je naw'Daq vo' (official pagh, laD neH). qo' mIllogh OpenStreetMap vo'. FIFA UEFA joq projectvam luvoqbe'.

cron.title: Qu'mey So'
cron.hint: Qu'mey So' - poHbogh DaqaSmoHlaHbogh je: poHmey, Qu' veb Qu' ramey je, mI', 'ej San. DaH yIqaSmoH, pagh San yISltlhej much DaleghmeH.

q1.a: Sum noHlu': mI' pup wej QuQ, QIH chuq lugh cha', jeywI' lugh wa', Qagh pagh. mI' pup jaq tev le' chel.

q2.a: may' taghDI', jabwI' 'oH wuqwI''e'. taghpa' wIvlIj DachoHlaH reH.

q3.a: wa' gho wa'logh, may'vaD Hov yIQeq: QuQmey cha'logh boqlu'. cha' may'mey taghbe'taHvIS yIvIHlaH.

q4.a: may' wa'DIch taghpa', 'aqtu' jeywI' yInoH. bIlughchugh, HevDaq tev DaHev - wIvlIj FIFA patlh Sub law', tev tIn law' - 'ej may'meylIj joqwI' che'wI' wIvlIj.

q5.a: may' taghpu'DI' neH. taghpa' peghqu' wIvmeylIj.

q6.a: Quj mI' Qav noHlu'. QI'D bachmey ghoSwI' wuq, QuQmeylIj wuqbe'.

q7.a: FIFA UEFA je naw'mey vo': may'mey, DaH mI'mey, SuvwI'pu', De' je. Sofascore vo' qImHa'ghach mI'mey. qo' mIllogh OpenStreetMap.

q8.a: naQ tlhab. WTFPL bIngDaq poSmoHlu'pu'. Hoch ngoq yIlaD, Doch'a'lIj yIche'.

formula.a: Hoch wIv 90 tup mI' noHlu'. naQ chen:
formula.example: bI'reS: Brazil 2-1 DawIv, 2-1 rIn - mI' pup (3). Brazil jey wIvbogh Hoch, 4% neH 2-1 wIv, vaj le' +4 chel, 7 'ot. HevDaq joq Hov lo'taHvIS, cha'logh.
formula.code:
'ot = (waw' + le') × boq'egh   (+ che'wI' & vongwI' HevDaq)

waw'    = 3  mI' pup            (juH & raQ chned)
          2  mISmoH pup         (je Qap pup)
          1  Qap neH pup        (Qap / rar / lujmoH)
          0  latlh

le'     = mI' pup tev, le'taHghach,
          Qap pup ghotpu' je:
          +5  < 1%      +4  < 5%       +3  < 12%
          +2  < 22%     +1  < 35%      +0  latlh   (≥ 5 ghot poQ)
          Qap pup le' tev (Qap pup wIvpu' puS):  +2  < 10%   +1  < 25%

boq'egh = 2  may' joker, 'ej HevDaq Hoch
          1  latlh

che'wI' = qaStaHvIS tournament tev, jeywI'lI' che'chugh,
          Sub law' tev tIn law' (FIFA patlh, 4× SImraH)
vongwI' = tev, vongwI'lI' tournament vongwI' Dun chugh

q9.a: che'wI'lI' tlhej, Qup vongwI' Dun DawIv. vongwI' Dun wIvbogh Hoch (chetvI' bommey Hutlhlu') HevDaq tev luHev.

q10.a: Qup ghommey 'oH - pegh (De') joq lI'. ghom yIchenmoH joq juplI' ghom yIjun - reH SoH Dapanmey lI'; ghom neH patlh 'ej qum De' juvHa'.

q11.a: HISlaH. may'mey taHtaHvIS, provisional patlh 'ang patlhwI' - DaH DapanmeylIj mI' DaH juv, jorwI' choHtaHvIS DaH choH. may'Daq ghom patlh je DaH vIH.
